title: Every Compat Ultimate
description: Replaces EveryCompat's autogenerated textures for popular mods.
body:
Every Compat's autogenerated textures not enough for you? This resource pack has hand-crafted textures to make your building experience more enjoyable then tinted oak wood.



Wood types:

- gtceu:rubber
- tconstruct:greenheart
- tconstruct:skyroot
- tconstruct:bloodshroom (quark bookshelf only)
- tconstruct:enderbark (quark bookshelf only)

Mods:

- quark
- create



Feel free to use this resource pack in any modpacks, servers or derivative works.

_
Please note that this version may get less frequent updates than the curseforge version._
